calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Continued To Mar-24-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as regularly scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Saul Martin Ferster, Esq. represented Japanese American Religious Federation Housing, Inc. and there being no appearance by Defendants, Samuel McCroey and Monica Samuel the matter is removed off the settlement calendar, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
